The content flows continuously as one unified meeting transcript rather than separate articles. The General Session content that appears at the end seems to be the beginning of the next section and should remain with this department section as it's part of the same conference proceedings.

files.notes: This file contains a single article covering the General Session (Morning) of the Relief Society Conference. It includes multiple speakers: Counselor Jennie B. Knight, Mrs. Pearl C. Sloan, Mrs. Florence R. Knight, Mrs. Lalene H. Hart, Mrs. Annie Wells Cannon, and Miss Sarah M. McClelland. The content flows as one continuous session report rather than separate articles.
